context_text: <A> and his concept of the computer was taking it apart and not being able to put it back together / <B> no / <A> but we had an old one around along with a printer { and he } / <B> [ okay ] / <A> wasn't afraid of the technology he grew / <B> okay / <A> up with it and then he started to go on the internet but he started to learn his basics as far as reading and arithmetic even before kindergarten / <B> okay / <A> and then ah he goes to a public school and he does very well at school and then he supplements you know the usual games on the computer / <B> okay
